title: BudgetPolicy
description: RFC 0084 §A. The reserved `budget` run-options key (on `RunOptions.configurable`) — an enforceable per-run SPEND policy. Wall-time + loop-iterations are deliberately NOT here: those are RFC 0058's `runTimeoutMs` / `maxLoopIterations` (the §E orthogonality seam). 0084 governs spend; 0058 governs execution bounds; they share only the `cap.breached` overflow event. Every dimension is optional; an absent dimension is unbounded (host default).

maxTokens.description: Total input+output tokens across all `provider.usage` (RFC 0026) in the run.

maxCostUsd.description: Total cost summed from `provider.usage` `costEstimateUsd` (host-defined pricing per RFC 0026).

maxRetries.description: Ceiling over the cumulative RFC 0009 retry count (node + envelope retries); the run fails when cumulative retries hit it. NOT a separate retry mechanism (RFC 0084 §UQ4).

modelAllow.description: Optional allowlist (glob over provider model ids, e.g. `claude-*`). A run resolving to a model outside the allowlist is refused with `budget_model_denied` before the call.

modelDeny.description: Optional denylist. `modelDeny` wins on conflict with `modelAllow` (fail-closed).

thresholdPercent.description: Emit `budget.threshold.crossed` once per dimension at this percent of the dimension's limit.

onExhaustion.description: `fail` (default): `cap.breached{kind:"budget-*"}` → `run.failed{budget_exhausted}`. `interrupt`: raise an RFC 0051 approval interrupt so a human MAY extend the budget.
